headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -61.2)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 63% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 120 quotes, driven by 95 strong-intensity posts that are pushing scores well above average levels.

• At 58.6, frustration remains in the upper tier of its 117-day range, holding steady from yesterday's 60.0.

• Both fears and optimism sit below their typical ranges, with optimism showing a modest recovery from yesterday's deeper negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
